name: KOFI_PAYMENT

# Triggered by external webhook via repository_dispatch
# HOW TO WIRE THIS UP (one-time, 10 minutes, no new secrets):
#
#   1. Go to pipedream.com → New Workflow → HTTP Trigger → copy the URL
#   2. Go to ko-fi.com → Settings → API → paste the Pipedream URL as webhook
#   3. In Pipedream, add a "Send HTTP Request" step:
#        URL: https://api.github.com/repos/meekotharaccoon-cell/meeko-nerve-center/dispatches
#        Method: POST
#        Headers:
#          Authorization: Bearer <YOUR_GITHUB_PAT>
#          Accept: application/vnd.github.v3+json
#        Body:
#          {
#            "event_type": "kofi_payment",
#            "client_payload": {
#              "amount": "{{steps.trigger.event.body.amount}}",
#              "email": "{{steps.trigger.event.body.email}}",
#              "message": "{{steps.trigger.event.body.message}}"
#            }
#          }
#
# Result: Every Ko-fi payment → triggers this workflow in <30 seconds → revenue tracked
# GITHUB_TOKEN is already in every workflow run. No extra secrets needed here.

on:
  repository_dispatch:
    types: [kofi_payment, kofi_test, manual_payment]

  # Also allow manual trigger for testing
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      amount:
        description: 'Payment amount (e.g. 1.00)'
        required: false
        default: '1.00'
      email:
        description: 'Buyer email (optional)'
        required: false
        default: 'test@test.com'

jobs:
  process_payment:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: write

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.11'

      - name: Install deps
        run: pip install requests

      - name: Process payment
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          GMAIL_ADDRESS: ${{ secrets.GMAIL_ADDRESS }}
          GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD }}
          ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY }}
          HF_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.HF_TOKEN }}
          # Payment data from dispatch or manual input
          PAYMENT_AMOUNT: ${{ github.event.client_payload.amount || inputs.amount || '1.00' }}
          PAYMENT_EMAIL: ${{ github.event.client_payload.email || inputs.email || '' }}
          PAYMENT_MESSAGE: ${{ github.event.client_payload.message || '' }}
          PAYMENT_SOURCE: ${{ github.event.action || 'manual' }}
        run: python mycelium/DISPATCH_HANDLER.py

      - name: Commit updated state
        run: |
          git config --global user.email "solarpunk@meeko-nerve-center"
          git config --global user.name "SolarPunk"
          git add -A
          git diff --staged --quiet || git commit -m "💰 payment processed [\${{ github.event.client_payload.amount || inputs.amount || '1.00' }}] [skip ci]"
          git push || echo "Push failed — will retry next cycle"

name: "🔨 BUILD YOURSELF — Each Run Grows SolarPunk"

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      build_target:
        description: 'What to build (leave blank = Claude decides)'
        required: false
        default: ''
      turbo:
        description: 'Build 3 things at once instead of 1'
        required: false
        default: 'false'

# MANUAL TRIGGER WORKFLOW.
# Every time Meeko runs this, SolarPunk gets bigger.
# Claude reads the current state of the system,
# decides what's most missing / most valuable,
# builds it, tests it, commits it.
# Run it 10 times = 10 new capabilities added.

jobs:
  build:
    name: "🔨 Build Yourself"
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 30
    permissions:
      contents: write

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.11'

      - name: Install deps
        run: pip install requests 2>/dev/null || true

      - name: Configure git
        run: |
          git config user.name 'SolarPunk'
          git config user.email 'solarpunk@meeko-nerve-center'
          mkdir -p mycelium data

      - name: "🧠 Assess + Decide What To Build"
        env:
          ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY }}
          BUILD_TARGET: ${{ inputs.build_target }}
          TURBO: ${{ inputs.turbo }}
          GUMROAD_SECRET: ${{ secrets.GUMROAD_SECRET }}
          GUMROAD_ID: ${{ secrets.GUMROAD_ID }}
          GUMROAD_NAME: ${{ secrets.GUMROAD_NAME }}
          GMAIL_ADDRESS: ${{ secrets.GMAIL_ADDRESS }}
        run: |
          python3 - <<'PYEOF'
          import os, json, requests
          from pathlib import Path
          from datetime import datetime

          api_key     = os.environ.get("ANTHROPIC_API_KEY", "")
          build_target = os.environ.get("BUILD_TARGET", "").strip()
          turbo       = os.environ.get("TURBO", "false").lower() == "true"
          has_gumroad = bool(os.environ.get("GUMROAD_SECRET", ""))
          has_gmail   = bool(os.environ.get("GMAIL_ADDRESS", ""))

          engines   = sorted([f.name for f in Path("mycelium").glob("*.py") if not f.name.startswith("__")])
          workflows = sorted([f.name for f in Path(".github/workflows").glob("*.yml")])
          data_f    = sorted([f.name for f in Path("data").glob("*.json")]) if Path("data").exists() else []

          # Read guardian state to know what's missing
          guardian = {}
          gf = Path("data/guardian_state.json")
          if gf.exists():
              try: guardian = json.loads(gf.read_text())
              except: pass

          missing_required = guardian.get("missing_required_engines", [])

          # Income streams catalog
          INCOME_STREAMS = """
          PASSIVE INCOME STREAMS SOLARPUNK CAN BUILD:
          1. Gaza Rose Gallery — automated art drops, Gumroad listing engine
          2. AI-written content → Medium Partner Program (auto-publish daily articles)
          3. Prompt packs & templates → Gumroad store (auto-generate + list)
          4. Newsletter → Substack automation (auto-write + schedule)
          5. GitHub Sponsors — showcase SolarPunk itself as open source project
          6. Affiliate marketing — auto-blog posts with affiliate links
          7. API reselling — wrap free APIs with value-add, sell on RapidAPI
          8. Data products — curated datasets → Kaggle/HuggingFace + donations
          9. Human Payout Network — connect contributors, auto-split revenue via PayPal
          10. SolarPunk Brand™ — licensing, merch, B2B white-label system
          """

          n_to_build = 3 if turbo else 1

          prompt = f"""You are SolarPunk — an autonomous AI agent that builds itself.

CURRENT STATE:
- Engines: {engines}
- Workflows: {workflows}
- Data files: {data_f}
- Missing required engines: {missing_required}
- Gumroad connected: {has_gumroad} (secrets: GUMROAD_SECRET, GUMROAD_ID, GUMROAD_NAME)
- Gmail connected: {has_gmail}
- Build target: "{build_target or 'You decide — build the most valuable thing'}"

{INCOME_STREAMS}

YOUR JOB: Build {n_to_build} Python file(s) for the mycelium/ directory.
Each file must be a complete, production-ready engine that runs in GitHub Actions.
Import only: os, json, requests, datetime, pathlib, smtplib, email, re, urllib.

RULES (ABSOLUTE):
- NEVER write to .github/ directory
- ONLY write NEW files to mycelium/ or update data/
- Each engine reads config from environment variables (GitHub Secrets)
- Each engine writes results to data/[engine_name]_output.json
- Use GUMROAD_SECRET (not GUMROAD_ACCESS_TOKEN) for Gumroad API auth
- Use claude-sonnet-4-6 as model string for any Anthropic API calls

Respond ONLY with valid JSON (no markdown, no fences):
{{
  "engines": [
    {{
      "filename": "engine_name.py",
      "description": "one sentence what this does for Meeko",
      "income_stream": "which passive income stream this serves",
      "code": "complete python file content as a string"
    }}
  ],
  "build_log": "what you built and why",
  "next_build_suggestion": "what to build next run"
}}"""

          if not api_key:
              print("No API key — writing placeholder build plan")
              plan = {"engines": [], "build_log": "No API key — run with ANTHROPIC_API_KEY secret set", "next_build_suggestion": "Add ANTHROPIC_API_KEY secret first"}
          else:
              try:
                  r = requests.post(
                      "https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages",
                      headers={"x-api-key": api_key, "Content-Type": "application/json", "anthropic-version": "2023-06-01"},
                      json={"model": "claude-sonnet-4-6", "max_tokens": 8000,
                            "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": prompt}]},
                      timeout=120
                  )
                  r.raise_for_status()
                  text = r.json()["content"][0]["text"]
                  s, e = text.find("{"), text.rfind("}") + 1
                  plan = json.loads(text[s:e]) if s >= 0 else {"engines": [], "build_log": "Parse error", "next_build_suggestion": "Retry"}
              except Exception as ex:
                  print(f"API error: {ex}")
                  plan = {"engines": [], "build_log": str(ex), "next_build_suggestion": "Check API key"}

          Path("data/build_plan.json").write_text(json.dumps(plan, indent=2))
          print(f"Build plan: {len(plan.get('engines', []))} engines to create")
          print(f"Log: {plan.get('build_log', '')}")
          print(f"Next: {plan.get('next_build_suggestion', '')}")
          PYEOF

      - name: "⚙️ Write New Engines"
        run: |
          python3 - <<'PYEOF'
          import json
          from pathlib import Path

          plan_f = Path("data/build_plan.json")
          if not plan_f.exists():
              print("No build plan")
              exit(0)

          plan = json.loads(plan_f.read_text())
          built = []

          for eng in plan.get("engines", []):
              fname = eng.get("filename", "")
              code  = eng.get("code", "")
              if not fname or not code:
                  continue

              # SAFETY CHECK
              if "/" in fname or "\\" in fname or ".github" in fname:
                  print(f"⛔ BLOCKED unsafe path: {fname}")
                  continue
              if not fname.endswith(".py"):
                  print(f"⛔ BLOCKED non-py file: {fname}")
                  continue

              target = Path("mycelium") / fname
              target.write_text(code)
              built.append(fname)
              print(f"✅ Built: {fname} — {eng.get('description', '')}")

          print(f"\nTotal built this run: {len(built)}")
          if built:
              Path("data/last_build_output.json").write_text(json.dumps({"built": built}, indent=2))
          PYEOF

      - name: "✅ Test New Engines (syntax check)"
        run: |
          for f in mycelium/*.py; do
            python3 -m py_compile "$f" 2>&1 && echo "✅ $f" || echo "⚠️ syntax error: $f"
          done

      - name: "📊 Update Build Registry"
        run: |
          python3 - <<'PYEOF'
          import json
          from pathlib import Path
          from datetime import datetime

          registry_f = Path("data/build_registry.json")
          registry = []
          if registry_f.exists():
              try: registry = json.loads(registry_f.read_text())
              except: pass

          plan_f = Path("data/build_plan.json")
          if plan_f.exists():
              plan = json.loads(plan_f.read_text())
              for eng in plan.get("engines", []):
                  fname = eng.get("filename","")
                  if fname:
                      registry.append({
                          "built_at": datetime.now().isoformat(),
                          "filename": fname,
                          "description": eng.get("description",""),
                          "income_stream": eng.get("income_stream","")
                      })

          registry_f.write_text(json.dumps(registry, indent=2))
          print(f"Total engines ever built by BUILD_YOURSELF: {len(registry)}")

          suggestion = json.loads(plan_f.read_text()).get("next_build_suggestion","")
          if suggestion:
              Path("data/next_build_suggestion.txt").write_text(suggestion)
              print(f"Next run: {suggestion}")
          PYEOF

      - name: "🚀 Commit New Engines"
        run: |
          git add -A
          git diff --cached --quiet && echo "Nothing new to commit" && exit 0
          BUILT=$(python3 -c "import json; p=json.load(open('data/build_plan.json')); print(', '.join(e['filename'] for e in p.get('engines',[])))" 2>/dev/null || echo "engines")
          git commit -m "🔨 BUILD_YOURSELF: $BUILT [$(date +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M)]"
          git pull --rebase origin main || true
          git push origin main || git push origin main --force-with-lease

      - name: "📧 Email Meeko — What Was Built"
        env:
          GMAIL_ADDRESS: ${{ secrets.GMAIL_ADDRESS }}
          GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD }}
        run: |
          python3 - <<'PYEOF'
          import os, json, smtplib
          from pathlib import Path
          from datetime import datetime
          from email.mime.text import MIMEText

          gmail = os.environ.get("GMAIL_ADDRESS","")
          gpass = os.environ.get("GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD","")
          if not gmail or not gpass: exit(0)

          plan = {}
          pf = Path("data/build_plan.json")
          if pf.exists(): plan = json.loads(pf.read_text())

          reg = []
          rf = Path("data/build_registry.json")
          if rf.exists(): reg = json.loads(rf.read_text())

          engines_now = sorted([f.name for f in Path("mycelium").glob("*.py") if not f.name.startswith("__")])

          body = f"""🔨 BUILD_YOURSELF RUN COMPLETE — {datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M UTC')}
{'='*50}

WHAT WAS BUILT:
"""
          for e in plan.get("engines",[]):
              body += f"  ✅ {e['filename']}\n"
              body += f"     → {e.get('description','')}\n"
              body += f"     💰 {e.get('income_stream','')}\n\n"

          body += f"""
BUILD LOG:
{plan.get('build_log','')}

NEXT RUN SUGGESTION:
{plan.get('next_build_suggestion','')}

TOTAL ENGINES NOW: {len(engines_now)}
TOTAL BUILT BY BUILD_YOURSELF: {len(reg)}

Trigger another BUILD_YOURSELF run:
→ https://github.com/meekotharaccoon-cell/meeko-nerve-center/actions

— SolarPunk™ 🌱"""

          try:
              msg = MIMEText(body)
              msg["Subject"] = f"🔨 Built {len(plan.get('engines',[]))} new engines — SolarPunk [{datetime.now().strftime('%b %d')}]"
              msg["From"] = gmail
              msg["To"] = gmail
              with smtplib.SMTP_SSL("smtp.gmail.com", 465) as s:
                  s.login(gmail, gpass)
                  s.send_message(msg)
              print("Email sent to Meeko")
          except Exception as ex:
              print(f"Email error: {ex}")
          PYEOF

name: "🛡️ GUARDIAN — Self-Healing Watchdog"

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  watch:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: |
      github.actor != 'github-actions[bot]' &&
      !startsWith(github.event.head_commit.message, '[guardian]') &&
      !startsWith(github.event.head_commit.message, '[build]') &&
      !startsWith(github.event.head_commit.message, '[synapse]') &&
      !startsWith(github.event.head_commit.message, '[synthesis]') &&
      !contains(github.event.head_commit.message, 'loop [') &&
      !contains(github.event.head_commit.message, 'RESTORE') &&
      !contains(github.event.head_commit.message, 'checkpoint') &&
      !contains(github.event.head_commit.message, '[skip ci]') &&
      !contains(github.event.head_commit.message, 'brain ')
    permissions:
      contents: write

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 5
          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.11'

      - name: Configure git
        run: |
          git config user.name 'Guardian'
          git config user.email 'guardian@solarpunk'
          mkdir -p data saves

      - name: Watch + Protect
        env:
          GMAIL_ADDRESS: ${{ secrets.GMAIL_ADDRESS }}
          GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD }}
        run: |
          python3 - <<'PYEOF'
          import os, json, smtplib, sys, subprocess
          from pathlib import Path
          from datetime import datetime
          from email.mime.text import MIMEText

          def alert(subj, body):
              g = os.environ.get("GMAIL_ADDRESS","")
              p = os.environ.get("GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD","")
              if not g or not p: return
              try:
                  m = MIMEText(body)
                  m["Subject"] = subj; m["From"] = g; m["To"] = g
                  with smtplib.SMTP_SSL("smtp.gmail.com", 465) as s:
                      s.login(g, p); s.send_message(m)
              except Exception as e: print(f"Alert err: {e}")

          wf_dir = Path(".github/workflows")
          my_dir = Path("mycelium")
          workflows = [w.name for w in wf_dir.glob("*.yml")] if wf_dir.exists() else []
          engines   = [e.name for e in my_dir.glob("*.py")] if my_dir.exists() else []

          sf = Path("data/guardian_state.json")
          last = {}
          if sf.exists():
              try: last = json.loads(sf.read_text())
              except: pass

          last_wf  = set(last.get("workflow_names", workflows))
          last_eng = last.get("engine_names", engines)

          deleted_wf  = last_wf - set(workflows)
          deleted_eng = [e for e in last_eng if e not in engines]
          catastrophe = bool(deleted_wf) or (len(deleted_eng) > max(2, len(last_eng) * 0.3) and len(last_eng) > 3)

          if catastrophe:
              print(f"CATASTROPHE! Missing WF: {deleted_wf} | Engines: {deleted_eng[:5]}")
              alert("SOLARPUNK CATASTROPHE",
                  f"Deleted WF: {list(deleted_wf)}\nDeleted engines: {deleted_eng[:10]}\n\nRun RUN_NOW:\nhttps://github.com/meekotharaccoon-cell/meeko-nerve-center/actions")
              sys.exit(1)

          sf.write_text(json.dumps({
              "last_checked": datetime.now().isoformat(),
              "workflow_names": workflows,
              "engine_names": engines,
              "status": "healthy"
          }, indent=2))

          if len(workflows) >= 2 and len(engines) >= 3:
              snap = {}
              for w in wf_dir.glob("*.yml"):
                  snap[str(w)] = w.read_text()
              for eng in ["OMNIBUS.py","BUSINESS_FACTORY.py","REVENUE_LOOP.py","AI_CLIENT.py"]:
                  p = my_dir / eng
                  if p.exists():
                      try: snap[str(p)] = p.read_text()
                      except: pass
              Path("saves").mkdir(exist_ok=True)
              Path("saves/last_good_state.json").write_text(json.dumps({
                  "timestamp": datetime.now().isoformat(), "files": snap
              }))
              print(f"Snapshot: {len(snap)} files saved")

          print(f"Guardian OK: {len(workflows)} workflows, {len(engines)} engines")
          PYEOF

      - name: Commit checkpoint
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          git add data/guardian_state.json saves/ 2>/dev/null || true
          git diff --cached --quiet && echo "Clean" && exit 0
          git commit -m "[guardian] checkpoint $(date +%H:%M) -- healthy"
          git pull --rebase "https://${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}@github.com/${{ github.repository }}.git" main || true
          git push "https://${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}@github.com/${{ github.repository }}.git" HEAD:main
        continue-on-error: true

name: SolarPunk OMNIBRAIN v10

on:
  schedule:
    - cron: '0 6 * * *'
    - cron: '0 12 * * *'
    - cron: '0 18 * * *'
    - cron: '0 21 * * *'
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      reason:
        description: 'Why triggering manually'
        default: 'debug'
        required: false

permissions:
  contents: write

env:
  PYTHONPATH: mycelium
  ANTHROPIC_API_KEY:       ${{ secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY }}
  GROQ_API_KEY:            ${{ secrets.GROQ_API_KEY }}
  GMAIL_ADDRESS:           ${{ secrets.GMAIL_ADDRESS }}
  GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD:      ${{ secrets.GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD }}
  GITHUB_TOKEN:            ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
  GUMROAD_SECRET:          ${{ secrets.GUMROAD_SECRET }}
  GUMROAD_ID:              ${{ secrets.GUMROAD_ID }}
  GUMROAD_NAME:            ${{ secrets.GUMROAD_NAME }}
  HF_TOKEN:                ${{ secrets.HF_TOKEN }}
  KOFI_USERNAME:           ${{ secrets.KOFI_USERNAME }}
  KOFI_VERIFICATION_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.KOFI_VERIFICATION_TOKEN }}
  X_API_KEY:               ${{ secrets.X_API_KEY }}
  X_API_SECRET:            ${{ secrets.X_API_SECRET }}
  X_ACCESS_TOKEN:          ${{ secrets.X_ACCESS_TOKEN }}
  X_ACCESS_TOKEN_SECRET:   ${{ secrets.X_ACCESS_TOKEN_SECRET }}
  REDDIT_CLIENT_ID:        ${{ secrets.REDDIT_CLIENT_ID }}
  REDDIT_CLIENT_SECRET:    ${{ secrets.REDDIT_CLIENT_SECRET }}
  REDDIT_USERNAME:         ${{ secrets.REDDIT_USERNAME }}
  REDDIT_PASSWORD:         ${{ secrets.REDDIT_PASSWORD }}
  PAYPAL_CLIENT_ID:        ${{ secrets.PAYPAL_CLIENT_ID }}
  PAYPAL_CLIENT_SECRET:    ${{ secrets.PAYPAL_CLIENT_SECRET }}
  OPENROUTER_KEY:          ${{ secrets.OPENROUTER_KEY }}
  SERPAPI_KEY:             ${{ secrets.SERPAPI_KEY }}
  DEVTO_API_KEY:           ${{ secrets.DEVTO_API_KEY }}
  STRIKE_API_KEY:          ${{ secrets.STRIKE_API_KEY }}
  MEEKO_AFFILIATE_LINK:    autonomoushum-20

jobs:
  brain:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 55

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.11'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pip install requests python-dateutil imapclient tweepy praw beautifulsoup4 feedparser anthropic groq

      - name: Restore brain state
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: data/
          key: brain-${{ github.run_number }}
          restore-keys: brain-

      - run: mkdir -p docs

      - name: Validate secrets (live API tests — tells you exactly what's wrong)
        run: |
          python3 << 'PYEOF'
          import os, smtplib, urllib.request, urllib.parse, json

          def check(name, required=True):
              v = os.environ.get(name, '').strip()
              tag = 'REQUIRED' if required else 'optional'
              if v:
                  print(f'  OK  {name}: present ({len(v)} chars) [{tag}]')
              else:
                  print(f'  {"MISSING" if required else "skip"} {name} [{tag}]')
              return v

          print('=== Secrets presence ===')
          anthropic  = check('ANTHROPIC_API_KEY', True)
          groq_key   = check('GROQ_API_KEY', False)
          gmail_addr = check('GMAIL_ADDRESS', True)
          gmail_pw   = check('GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD', True)
          gumroad    = check('GUMROAD_SECRET', True)
          check('GITHUB_TOKEN', True)
          check('DEVTO_API_KEY', False)
          check('SERPAPI_KEY', False)
          check('STRIKE_API_KEY', False)

          print()
          print('=== Live API validation ===')

          # --- GROQ ---
          if groq_key:
              try:
                  req = urllib.request.Request('https://api.groq.com/openai/v1/models')
                  req.add_header('Authorization', f'Bearer {groq_key}')
                  with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=10) as r:
                      data = json.loads(r.read())
                  models = [m['id'] for m in data.get('data', [])[:3]]
                  print(f'  PASS GROQ_API_KEY -- valid, models: {models}')
              except Exception as e:
                  print(f'  FAIL GROQ_API_KEY -- REJECTED: {e}')
                  print(f'       Go to console.groq.com > API Keys > Create > paste full key into GitHub Secret GROQ_API_KEY')

          # --- GMAIL ---
          if gmail_addr and gmail_pw:
              pw = gmail_pw.replace(' ', '')  # strip display spaces
              try:
                  with smtplib.SMTP_SSL('smtp.gmail.com', 465, timeout=15) as s:
                      s.login(gmail_addr, pw)
                  print(f'  PASS GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD -- SMTP login OK')
              except smtplib.SMTPAuthenticationError as e:
                  print(f'  FAIL GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD -- Auth rejected: {e}')
                  print(f'       CAUSE: App Passwords only work when 2-Step Verification is ON.')
                  print(f'       FIX:')
                  print(f'         1. myaccount.google.com > Security > 2-Step Verification > turn ON')
                  print(f'         2. myaccount.google.com > search "App Passwords"')
                  print(f'         3. App name: SolarPunk > Generate')
                  print(f'         4. Copy the 16-char code (no spaces) > GitHub Secret GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD')
              except Exception as e:
                  print(f'  WARN GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD -- network error: {e}')

          # --- GUMROAD ---
          if gumroad:
              try:
                  token = urllib.parse.quote(gumroad)
                  url = f'https://api.gumroad.com/v2/user?access_token={token}'
                  req = urllib.request.Request(url)
                  req.add_header('User-Agent', 'SolarPunk/1.0')
                  with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=10) as r:
                      data = json.loads(r.read())
                  if data.get('success'):
                      user = data.get('user', {})
                      print(f'  PASS GUMROAD_SECRET -- account: {user.get("email", "?")}')
                  else:
                      print(f'  FAIL GUMROAD_SECRET -- API rejected token: {data}')
                      print(f'       FIX: gumroad.com > Settings > Advanced > scroll to Applications section')
                      print(f'            Click "Generate Token" > copy ENTIRE token > paste into GUMROAD_SECRET')
              except Exception as e:
                  print(f'  FAIL GUMROAD_SECRET -- error: {e}')
          PYEOF
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Run OMNIBUS
        run: python mycelium/OMNIBUS.py
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Commit + push
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          git config user.name "SolarPunk Brain"
          git config user.email "meekotharaccoon@gmail.com"
          git add data/ docs/ mycelium/ README.md 2>/dev/null || true
          git diff --staged --quiet && echo "nothing to commit" && exit 0
          git commit -m "🧠 brain $(date -u +'%Y-%m-%d %H:%M') UTC [skip ci]"
          git pull --rebase "https://${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}@github.com/${{ github.repository }}.git" main || true
          git push "https://${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}@github.com/${{ github.repository }}.git" HEAD:main

# Trigger: mention @claude in any Issue or PR comment
# Also fires when any issue is opened/assigned (so @claude in title or body works)
on:
  issue_comment:
    types: [created]
  pull_request_review_comment:
    types: [created]
  issues:

jobs:

      (github.event_name == 'issue_comment' && contains(github.event.comment.body, '@claude')) ||
      (github.event_name == 'pull_request_review_comment' && contains(github.event.comment.body, '@claude')) ||
      (github.event_name == 'pull_request_review' && contains(github.event.review.body, '@claude')) ||
      (github.event_name == 'issues' && (contains(github.event.issue.body, '@claude') || contains(github.event.issue.title, '@claude')))

name: Claude Brain — Full Repo Access + Tool Use

# ALL the triggers. Claude responds to everything, proactively self-tasks,
# reviews PRs, runs on schedule, and triggers on push failures.
on:
  # Someone mentions @claude in an issue or comment
  issues:
    types: [opened, assigned]
  issue_comment:
    types: [created]

  # PRs — Claude reviews and responds
  pull_request:
    types: [opened, synchronize, ready_for_review]
  pull_request_review_comment:
    types: [created]

  # Scheduled: Claude proactively analyzes system state and opens tasks
  schedule:
    - cron: '0 8 * * *'   # 8am UTC daily — morning analysis + self-tasking

  # Manual trigger — run Claude with custom input
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      prompt:
        description: 'What to ask Claude (no @claude needed)'
        required: true
        type: string
      mode:
        description: 'Mode'
        required: false
        default: 'respond'
        type: choice
        options:
          - respond
          - proactive_analysis
          - fix_failing_engines
          - build_engine

jobs:
  claude_brain:
    # Conditional: run on @claude mention, scheduled, dispatch, or PR
    if: |
      github.event_name == 'schedule' ||
      github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' ||
      (github.event_name == 'issues' && (
        contains(github.event.issue.body, '@claude') ||
        contains(github.event.issue.title, '@claude')
      )) ||
      (github.event_name == 'issue_comment' &&
        contains(github.event.comment.body, '@claude')
      ) ||
      (github.event_name == 'pull_request' && (
        contains(github.event.pull_request.body, '@claude') ||
        github.event.pull_request.draft == false
      )) ||
      github.event_name == 'pull_request_review_comment'

    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 15

    permissions:
      contents: write        # read + commit files
      issues: write          # read + create + label + close issues
      pull-requests: write   # read + comment + approve PRs
      actions: read          # read workflow run status
      checks: read           # read check statuses
      statuses: read         # read commit statuses

    steps:
      - name: Checkout (full history)
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0     # full history so Claude can see git log

      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.11'

      - name: Install deps
        run: pip install requests

      - name: Run Claude Brain
        env:
          ANTHROPIC_API_KEY:  ${{ secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY }}
          GITHUB_TOKEN:       ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          REPO:               ${{ github.repository }}
          EVENT_NAME:         ${{ github.event_name }}
          ISSUE_NUMBER:       ${{ github.event.issue.number }}
          ISSUE_TITLE:        ${{ github.event.issue.title }}
          ISSUE_BODY:         ${{ github.event.issue.body }}
          COMMENT_BODY:       ${{ github.event.comment.body }}
          PR_NUMBER:          ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
          PR_TITLE:           ${{ github.event.pull_request.title }}
          PR_BODY:            ${{ github.event.pull_request.body }}
          PR_REVIEW_COMMENT:  ${{ github.event.comment.body }}
          DISPATCH_PROMPT:    ${{ github.event.inputs.prompt }}
          DISPATCH_MODE:      ${{ github.event.inputs.mode }}
          GITHUB_SHA:         ${{ github.sha }}
          GITHUB_REF:         ${{ github.ref }}
          GITHUB_RUN_ID:      ${{ github.run_id }}
        run: python .github/scripts/claude_brain.py

files..github/workflows/BUILD.yml:
name: "🔨 BUILD — SolarPunk Self-Assembly"

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      note:
        description: 'Focus for this build (blank = Claude decides)'
        required: false
        default: ''

permissions:
  contents: write

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 30
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.11'

      - run: pip install requests

      - name: Configure git
        run: |
          git config user.name 'SolarPunk-Build'
          git config user.email 'build@solarpunk'
          mkdir -p data mycelium

      - name: Build via Claude
        env:
          ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY }}
          HF_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.HF_TOKEN }}
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          BUILD_NOTE: ${{ github.event.inputs.note }}
          GUMROAD_SECRET: ${{ secrets.GUMROAD_SECRET }}
          GUMROAD_ID: ${{ secrets.GUMROAD_ID }}
          GUMROAD_NAME: ${{ secrets.GUMROAD_NAME }}
        run: |
          python3 - <<'PYEOF'
          import os, json, requests
          from pathlib import Path
          from datetime import datetime

          api_key = os.environ.get("ANTHROPIC_API_KEY", "")
          hf_key  = os.environ.get("HF_TOKEN", "")
          note    = os.environ.get("BUILD_NOTE", "").strip()

          engines   = sorted([f.name for f in Path("mycelium").glob("*.py") if not f.name.startswith("__")])
          data_files = sorted([f.name for f in Path("data").glob("*.json")]) if Path("data").exists() else []

          prompt = f"""You are SolarPunk — Meeko's autonomous AI revenue system building itself.

CURRENT ENGINES: {engines}
DATA FILES: {data_files}
BUILD FOCUS: {note or 'Build the most impactful missing engine for autonomous revenue'}

Build ONE new Python engine for mycelium/ that:
- Does NOT duplicate any engine listed above
- Generates or amplifies revenue autonomously
- Runs fully on GitHub Actions (no human input after setup)
- Uses ONLY: requests, json, os, pathlib, datetime, smtplib, re (stdlib only)
- Has a run() function and if __name__=="__main__": run()
- Reads config from os.environ (GitHub Secrets)
- Saves state to data/ENGINENAME_state.json
- Under 200 lines, handles all exceptions gracefully

Available secrets: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, GUMROAD_SECRET, GUMROAD_ID, GUMROAD_NAME,
GMAIL_ADDRESS, GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD, HF_TOKEN, GITHUB_TOKEN

Respond ONLY with:
FILENAME: ENGINE_NAME.py
---
<complete python code>
---"""

          def call_anthropic(prompt):
              r = requests.post(
                  "https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages",
                  headers={"x-api-key": api_key, "anthropic-version": "2023-06-01", "Content-Type": "application/json"},
                  json={"model": "claude-sonnet-4-6", "max_tokens": 4000,
                        "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": prompt}]},
                  timeout=120
              )
              r.raise_for_status()
              return r.json()["content"][0]["text"]

          def call_hf(prompt):
              for model in ["Qwen/Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct", "meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct"]:
                  try:
                      r = requests.post(
                          f"https://api-inference.huggingface.co/models/{model}/v1/chat/completions",
                          headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {hf_key}"},
                          json={"model": model, "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": prompt}], "max_tokens": 4000},
                          timeout=120
                      )
                      r.raise_for_status()
                      return r.json()["choices"][0]["message"]["content"]
                  except Exception as e:
                      print(f"HF/{model} failed: {e}")
              raise RuntimeError("All AI backends failed")

          text = ""
          if api_key:
              try:
                  text = call_anthropic(prompt)
                  print("✅ Claude responded")
              except Exception as e:
                  print(f"Anthropic error: {e}")
          if not text and hf_key:
              try:
                  text = call_hf(prompt)
                  print("✅ HuggingFace responded")
              except Exception as e:
                  print(f"HF error: {e}")

          if not text:
              print("❌ No AI response — no API keys configured or all failed")
              exit(0)

          # Parse response
          fname = ""
          code_lines = []
          in_code = False
          dashes = 0
          for line in text.split("\n"):
              if line.startswith("FILENAME:"):
                  fname = line.split("FILENAME:")[1].strip()
              elif line.strip() == "---":
                  dashes += 1
                  if dashes == 1: in_code = True
                  elif dashes == 2: in_code = False
              elif in_code:
                  code_lines.append(line)

          if not fname or not code_lines:
              print("❌ Could not parse response — bad format")
              print(text[:500])
              exit(0)

          code = "\n".join(code_lines)

          # Safety checks
          blocked = ["os.system(", "eval(", "exec(", ".github", "git push", "git merge"]
          for bad in blocked:
              if bad in code:
                  print(f"⛔ Safety block: {bad} found in generated code")
                  exit(0)

          if not fname.endswith(".py") or "/" in fname or "\\" in fname:
              print(f"⛔ Bad filename: {fname}")
              exit(0)

          target = Path("mycelium") / fname
          target.write_text(code)
          print(f"✅ Built: {fname} ({len(code_lines)} lines)")

          # Log
          log_f = Path("data/build_log.json")
          log = json.loads(log_f.read_text()) if log_f.exists() else []
          log.append({"ts": datetime.now().isoformat(), "engine": fname, "note": note, "lines": len(code_lines)})
          log_f.write_text(json.dumps(log[-100:], indent=2))
          PYEOF

      - name: Syntax check all engines
        run: |
          ok=0; fail=0
          for f in mycelium/*.py; do
            python3 -m py_compile "$f" 2>/dev/null && ok=$((ok+1)) || { echo "⚠️ syntax error: $f"; fail=$((fail+1)); }
          done
          echo "✅ $ok engines OK | ⚠️ $fail syntax errors"

      - name: Commit
        run: |
          git add data/ mycelium/
          git diff --staged --quiet && echo "Nothing built" && exit 0
          git commit -m "🔨 BUILD: $(date +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M) — ${{ github.event.inputs.note || 'autonomous build' }}"
          git push "https://${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}@github.com/${{ github.repository }}.git" HEAD:main

name: WEBHOOK_RELAY

# Generic repository_dispatch receiver — ONE workflow handles ALL payment platforms
#
# WIRE ANY PLATFORM IN 5 MIN (no new GitHub Secrets needed):
#
#   1. pipedream.com → New Workflow → HTTP Trigger → copy URL
#   2. Paste that URL into your payment platform's webhook settings:
#        Ko-fi:   Settings → API → Webhook URL
#        Gumroad: Settings → Advanced → Webhooks
#        Stripe:  Developers → Webhooks → Add endpoint
#   3. In Pipedream, add "Send HTTP Request" step:
#        POST https://api.github.com/repos/meekotharaccoon-cell/meeko-nerve-center/dispatches
#        Auth: Bearer YOUR_GITHUB_PAT   ← PAT lives ONLY in Pipedream, never in GitHub
#        Body: {"event_type":"kofi_payment","client_payload":{"amount":"{{amount}}","email":"{{email}}"}}
#
# Result: payment received → Pipedream fires → this workflow runs in <30s
# GITHUB_TOKEN handles everything on the GitHub side. Zero extra secrets here.

on:
  repository_dispatch:
    types:
      - kofi_payment
      - kofi_test
      - gumroad_sale
      - github_sponsor
      - stripe_payment
      - manual_payment
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      amount:
        description: 'Test payment amount'
        default: '1.00'
      platform:
        description: 'Platform'
        default: 'test'

jobs:
  handle_payment:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: write
      issues: write

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.11'

      - run: pip install requests

      - name: Process payment
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          GMAIL_ADDRESS: ${{ secrets.GMAIL_ADDRESS }}
          GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD }}
          PAYMENT_AMOUNT: ${{ github.event.client_payload.amount || inputs.amount || '0' }}
          PAYMENT_EMAIL:  ${{ github.event.client_payload.email || '' }}
          PAYMENT_MESSAGE: ${{ github.event.client_payload.message || '' }}
          PAYMENT_SOURCE: ${{ github.event.action || 'manual' }}
        run: python mycelium/DISPATCH_HANDLER.py

      - name: Sync issues
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
        run: python mycelium/ISSUE_SYNC.py

      - name: Commit state
        run: |
          git config --global user.email "solarpunk@meeko"
          git config --global user.name "SolarPunk"
          git add -A
          git diff --staged --quiet || git commit -m "💰 payment [${{ github.event.action || 'test' }}] ${{ github.event.client_payload.amount || inputs.amount }}  [skip ci]"
          git push || true

      - name: Read system state
        run: |
          python3 - <<'PYEOF'
          import json
          from pathlib import Path
          from datetime import datetime

          data_dir = Path("data")
          outputs = {}
          for f in sorted(data_dir.glob("*.json"))[-20:]:
              try: outputs[f.name] = json.loads(f.read_text())
              except: pass

          brain   = outputs.get("brain_state.json", {})
          biz     = outputs.get("business_factory_state.json", {})
          engines = [f.name for f in sorted(Path("mycelium").glob("*.py"))]
          revenue = outputs.get("revenue_inbox.json", {})

          ctx = {
              "ts":               datetime.now().isoformat(),
              "total_engines":    len(engines),
              "engine_names":     engines[:30],
              "businesses_built": len(biz.get("businesses_built", [])),
              "brain_health":     brain.get("health_score", 0),
              "total_loops":      brain.get("total_loops_completed", 0),
              "total_revenue":    revenue.get("total_received", 0),
              "total_to_gaza":    revenue.get("total_to_gaza", 0),
              "data_files":       list(outputs.keys()),
          }
          Path("data/loop_context.json").write_text(json.dumps(ctx, indent=2))
          print(f"State read: {len(engines)} engines | {ctx['businesses_built']} businesses | ${ctx['total_revenue']:.2f} total revenue")
          PYEOF
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Synthesize + Decide via Claude
        env:
          ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY }}
          HF_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.HF_TOKEN }}
          INPUT_SEED: ${{ github.event.inputs.seed }}
          GUMROAD_SECRET: ${{ secrets.GUMROAD_SECRET }}
          GUMROAD_ID: ${{ secrets.GUMROAD_ID }}
          GUMROAD_NAME: ${{ secrets.GUMROAD_NAME }}
          GMAIL_ADDRESS: ${{ secrets.GMAIL_ADDRESS }}
        run: |
          python3 - <<'PYEOF'
          import os, json, requests
          from pathlib import Path
          from datetime import datetime

          api_key  = os.environ.get("ANTHROPIC_API_KEY", "")
          hf_key   = os.environ.get("HF_TOKEN", "")
          seed     = os.environ.get("INPUT_SEED", "").strip()
          has_gumroad = bool(os.environ.get("GUMROAD_SECRET", ""))
          has_gmail   = bool(os.environ.get("GMAIL_ADDRESS", ""))

          ctx_f = Path("data/loop_context.json")
          ctx   = json.loads(ctx_f.read_text()) if ctx_f.exists() else {}

          prompt = f"""You are SolarPunk™ — Meeko's autonomous AI revenue agent. Analyze state and decide.

SYSTEM STATE:
- Engines: {ctx.get('total_engines')} | Businesses: {ctx.get('businesses_built')}
- Revenue: ${ctx.get('total_revenue', 0):.2f} total | ${ctx.get('total_to_gaza', 0):.2f} to Gaza
- Brain health: {ctx.get('brain_health')} | Loops completed: {ctx.get('total_loops')}
- Gumroad connected: {has_gumroad} (use GUMROAD_SECRET token)
- Email connected: {has_gmail}
- Seed instruction: "{seed or '(none — full autonomy)'}"

Decide the 3 highest-leverage actions to maximize autonomous revenue RIGHT NOW.
Respond ONLY as JSON:
{{"decisions":[{{"action":"...","why":"...","urgency":"now|next_cycle","revenue_impact":"low|medium|high"}}],"key_insight":"...","meeko_message":"...","health_delta": 5}}"""

          decisions = None
          if api_key:
              try:
                  r = requests.post(
                      "https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages",
                      headers={"x-api-key": api_key, "anthropic-version": "2023-06-01", "Content-Type": "application/json"},
                      json={"model": "claude-sonnet-4-6", "max_tokens": 800,
                            "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": prompt}]},
                      timeout=60
                  )
                  r.raise_for_status()
                  text = r.json()["content"][0]["text"]
                  s, e = text.find("{"), text.rfind("}") + 1
                  if s >= 0: decisions = json.loads(text[s:e])
                  print("✅ Claude synthesized decisions")
              except Exception as ex:
                  print(f"Anthropic error: {ex}")

          if not decisions and hf_key:
              try:
                  r = requests.post(
                      "https://api-inference.huggingface.co/models/Qwen/Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct/v1/chat/completions",
                      headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {hf_key}"},
                      json={"model": "Qwen/Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct",
                            "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": prompt}], "max_tokens": 800},
                      timeout=60
                  )
                  r.raise_for_status()
                  text = r.json()["choices"][0]["message"]["content"]
                  s, e = text.find("{"), text.rfind("}") + 1
                  if s >= 0: decisions = json.loads(text[s:e])
              except Exception as ex:
                  print(f"HF error: {ex}")

          if not decisions:
              decisions = {
                  "decisions": [
                      {"action": "Run BUILD_YOURSELF to add missing revenue engine", "why": "More engines = more money paths", "urgency": "now", "revenue_impact": "high"},
                      {"action": "Publish all pending Gumroad listings via GUMROAD_ENGINE", "why": "Unlisted products earn $0", "urgency": "now", "revenue_impact": "high"},
                      {"action": "Generate + queue social posts for all products", "why": "Distribution is the gap", "urgency": "now", "revenue_impact": "medium"},
                  ],
                  "key_insight": "Build → deploy → promote → repeat. Every idle product is lost revenue.",
                  "meeko_message": "SolarPunk™ loop running autonomously.",
                  "health_delta": 3,
              }

          Path("data/loop_decisions.json").write_text(json.dumps(decisions, indent=2))
          for d in decisions.get("decisions", []):
              print(f"  [{d.get('urgency')}] [{d.get('revenue_impact','?')} impact] {d.get('action')}")
          print(f"\nInsight: {decisions.get('key_insight', '')}")
          print(f"To Meeko: {decisions.get('meeko_message', '')}")
          PYEOF
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Update brain health + seed next OMNIBRAIN
        run: |
          python3 - <<'PYEOF'
          import json
          from pathlib import Path
          from datetime import datetime

          df = Path("data/loop_decisions.json")
          decisions = json.loads(df.read_text()) if df.exists() else {}
          health_delta = decisions.get("health_delta", 3)

          brain_f = Path("data/brain_state.json")
          brain = json.loads(brain_f.read_text()) if brain_f.exists() else {}
          old_h = brain.get("health_score", 40)
          brain["health_score"] = min(100, old_h + health_delta)
          brain["total_loops_completed"] = brain.get("total_loops_completed", 0) + 1
          brain["last_loop"] = datetime.now().isoformat()
          brain_f.write_text(json.dumps(brain, indent=2))
          print(f"Health: {old_h} → {brain['health_score']} (+{health_delta})")

          seed = {
              "generated_at": datetime.now().isoformat(),
              "from_loop": True,
              "instructions": [d.get("action","") for d in decisions.get("decisions",[]) if d.get("urgency") == "now"],
              "key_insight": decisions.get("key_insight",""),
          }
          Path("data/omnibrain_seed.json").write_text(json.dumps(seed, indent=2))
          print(f"Seeded {len(seed['instructions'])} instructions for next OMNIBRAIN")
          PYEOF
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Email loop summary
        env:
          GMAIL_ADDRESS: ${{ secrets.GMAIL_ADDRESS }}
          GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD }}
        run: |
          python3 - <<'PYEOF'
          import os, json, smtplib
          from pathlib import Path
          from datetime import datetime
          from email.mime.text import MIMEText

          gmail = os.environ.get("GMAIL_ADDRESS", "")
          gpass = os.environ.get("GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD", "")
          if not gmail or not gpass:
              print("No email creds — skipping")
              exit(0)

          decisions = json.loads(Path("data/loop_decisions.json").read_text()) if Path("data/loop_decisions.json").exists() else {}
          ctx = json.loads(Path("data/loop_context.json").read_text()) if Path("data/loop_context.json").exists() else {}

          body = f"""SOLARPUNK™ LOOP — {datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M UTC')}

{decisions.get('meeko_message', 'Loop ran.')}

KEY INSIGHT: {decisions.get('key_insight', '(none)')}

DECISIONS:
"""
          for i, d in enumerate(decisions.get("decisions", []), 1):
              body += f"  {i}. [{d.get('urgency','?')}] [{d.get('revenue_impact','?')} impact] {d.get('action','')}\n"

          body += f"""
SYSTEM STATS:
  Engines:   {ctx.get('total_engines','?')}
  Revenue:   ${ctx.get('total_revenue', 0):.2f} total
  → Gaza:    ${ctx.get('total_to_gaza', 0):.2f}
  Health:    {ctx.get('brain_health','?')}/100
  Loops:     {ctx.get('total_loops','?')}

Store: https://meekotharaccoon-cell.github.io/meeko-nerve-center/store.html
Social queue: https://meekotharaccoon-cell.github.io/meeko-nerve-center/social.html
Actions: https://github.com/meekotharaccoon-cell/meeko-nerve-center/actions

— SolarPunk™"""

          try:
              msg = MIMEText(body)
              msg["Subject"] = f"[SolarPunk™] Loop {datetime.now().strftime('%b %d')} — ${ctx.get('total_revenue',0):.2f} | {ctx.get('total_engines','?')} engines"
              msg["From"] = gmail; msg["To"] = gmail
              with smtplib.SMTP_SSL("smtp.gmail.com", 465) as s:
                  s.login(gmail, gpass); s.send_message(msg)
              print("Loop summary emailed")
          except Exception as e:
              print(f"Email error: {e}")
          PYEOF
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Commit
        run: |
          git add data/
          git diff --staged --quiet && echo 'Nothing to commit' && exit 0
          git commit -m "🌱 loop $(date +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M) [skip ci]"
          git pull --rebase "https://${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}@github.com/${{ github.repository }}.git" main || true
          git push "https://${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}@github.com/${{ github.repository }}.git" HEAD:main
        continue-on-error: true

name: Claude Issue Responder — powered by ANTHROPIC_API_KEY

# Triggers when anyone mentions @claude in an issue or issue comment
# Uses your existing ANTHROPIC_API_KEY — no extra tokens needed
on:
  issues:
    types: [opened]
  issue_comment:
    types: [created]

jobs:
  respond:
    # Only run if @claude is mentioned
    if: |
      (github.event_name == 'issues' && (
        contains(github.event.issue.body, '@claude') ||
        contains(github.event.issue.title, '@claude')
      )) ||
      (github.event_name == 'issue_comment' &&
        contains(github.event.comment.body, '@claude')
      )

    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: write
      issues: write

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 1

      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.11'

      - name: Install deps
        run: pip install requests

      - name: Claude responds to issue
        env:
          ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY }}
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          ISSUE_NUMBER: ${{ github.event.issue.number }}
          ISSUE_TITLE: ${{ github.event.issue.title }}
          ISSUE_BODY: ${{ github.event.issue.body }}
          COMMENT_BODY: ${{ github.event.comment.body }}
          REPO: ${{ github.repository }}
          EVENT_NAME: ${{ github.event_name }}
        run: python .github/scripts/claude_respond.py

import os, sys, json, time, subprocess
from pathlib import Path
from datetime import datetime, timezone

DATA     = Path("data");     DATA.mkdir(exist_ok=True)
DOCS     = Path("docs");     DOCS.mkdir(exist_ok=True)
MYCELIUM = Path("mycelium")
PYTHON   = sys.executable
BASE     = "https://meekotharaccoon-cell.github.io/meeko-nerve-center"

results = {"ok": [], "failed": [], "skipped": [], "log": []}


def eng(name, *, timeout=120):
    script = MYCELIUM / f"{name}.py"
    if not script.exists():
        results["skipped"].append(name)
        results["log"].append({"engine": name, "status": "skipped"})
        print(f"  skip {name}")
        return False
    t0 = time.time()
    try:
        proc = subprocess.run(
            [PYTHON, str(script)],
            capture_output=True, text=True,
            timeout=timeout, cwd=Path.cwd(), env=dict(os.environ),
        )
        el  = round(time.time() - t0, 1)
        ok  = proc.returncode == 0
        key = "ok" if ok else "failed"
        results[key].append(name)
        tail = [l.strip() for l in (proc.stdout or "").splitlines() if l.strip()]
        last = tail[-1][:80] if tail else ""
        icon = "OK" if ok else "XX"
        print(f"  {icon} {name} ({el}s)" + (f"  <- {last}" if last else ""))
        if not ok:
            err = (proc.stderr or "").strip().splitlines()
            if err: print(f"     ! {err[-1][:120]}")
        results["log"].append({
            "engine": name, "status": key, "code": proc.returncode,
            "elapsed": el, "stdout_tail": (proc.stdout or "")[-500:],
            "stderr_tail": (proc.stderr or "")[-300:],
        })
        return ok
    except subprocess.TimeoutExpired:
        results["failed"].append(name)
        results["log"].append({"engine": name, "status": "timeout", "elapsed": timeout})
        print(f"  TIMEOUT {name} {timeout}s")
        return False
    except Exception as e:
        results["failed"].append(name)
        results["log"].append({"engine": name, "status": "exception", "error": str(e)})
        print(f"  ERR {name}: {e}")
        return False


def rj(fname, fb=None):

        except: pass
    return fb if fb is not None else {}

def save_package(plan, niche_data):
    niche_slug = niche_data["niche"].lower().replace(" ", "_").replace("/", "_").replace(".", "")[:40]
    ts         = datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime("%Y%m%d%H%M")
    biz_id     = f"{niche_slug}_{ts}"

    package = {
        "id":       biz_id,
        "niche":    niche_data,
        "plan":     plan,
        "built_at": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),
        "status":   "ready_to_launch",
        "affiliate_links": AFFILIATE_LINKS,
        "estimated_monthly_revenue": plan.get("monthly_revenue_estimate", "unknown"),
        "gaza_contribution": "15% of all sales",
    }

    (DATA / f"business_{niche_slug}.json").write_text(json.dumps(package, indent=2))
    print(f"  Saved: data/business_{niche_slug}.json")
    return package


def notify(package):
    if not GMAIL or not GPWD:
        return
    plan = package["plan"]
    body = f"""New business built by BUSINESS_FACTORY:

Business:  {plan.get('business_name','?')}
Tagline:   {plan.get('tagline','?')}
Price:     ${plan.get('price','?')}
Revenue:   {plan.get('monthly_revenue_estimate','?')}
Gaza:      {plan.get('gaza_impact','15%')}

Next: LANDING_DEPLOYER will create live page on next cycle.
Social posts queued for SOCIAL_PROMOTER.

— BUSINESS_FACTORY / SolarPunk"""
    try:
        msg = MIMEText(body)
        msg["From"] = GMAIL; msg["To"] = GMAIL
        msg["Subject"] = f"[SolarPunk] 🏗️ Built: {plan.get('business_name','?')}"
        with smtplib.SMTP("smtp.gmail.com", 587) as s:
            s.starttls(); s.login(GMAIL, GPWD); s.sendmail(GMAIL, GMAIL, msg.as_string())
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"  Email error: {e}")


def run():
    state = load()
    state["cycles"]   = state.get("cycles", 0) + 1
    state["last_run"] = datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()
    built_niches = {b.get("niche") for b in state.get("businesses_built", [])}
    print(f"BUSINESS_FACTORY cycle {state['cycles']} | {len(built_niches)} niches built | AI={'on' if AI_AVAILABLE else 'off'}")

    niche_data = get_next_niche(built_niches, state)
    print(f"  Building: {niche_data['niche']} @ ${niche_data['price']}")

    plan = build_plan(niche_data)
    if not plan:
        print("  Plan failed — skipping cycle")
        save(state)
        return state

    package = save_package(plan, niche_data)

    # Queue social posts for SOCIAL_PROMOTER
    social_posts = plan.get("social_posts", [])
    if social_posts:
        qf = DATA / "social_queue.json"
        q  = json.loads(qf.read_text()) if qf.exists() else {"posts": []}
        ts = datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()
        for p in social_posts:
            p.update({"queued_at": ts, "source": "BUSINESS_FACTORY", "niche": niche_data["niche"]})
        q.setdefault("posts", []).extend(social_posts)
        q["posts"] = q["posts"][-200:]
        qf.write_text(json.dumps(q, indent=2))
        print(f"  {len(social_posts)} social posts queued")

    state.setdefault("businesses_built", []).append({
        "niche":    niche_data["niche"],
        "name":     plan.get("business_name", "?"),
        "price":    niche_data["price"],
        "revenue":  plan.get("monthly_revenue_estimate", "?"),
        "built_at": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),
    })
    state["total_revenue_potential"] = sum(b.get("price", 0) * 20 for b in state["businesses_built"])

    notify(package)
    print(f"  ✅ {plan.get('business_name','?')} | {plan.get('monthly_revenue_estimate','?')}")
    print(f"  💰 Gaza: {plan.get('gaza_impact','15%')}")
    print(f"  📊 Total potential: ${state['total_revenue_potential']:,}/month")

    save(state)
    return state


if __name__ == "__main__":
    run()

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
AI_CLIENT.py — SolarPunk unified AI brain
==========================================

THE LOOP: SolarPunk calls AI → AI builds SolarPunk → SolarPunk earns →
          SolarPunk calls AI → forever.

Priority chain (free first, always):
  1. GROQ  — FREE tier, OpenAI-compatible, fast (llama3, mixtral, gemma)
             Never runs out. The backbone. The heartbeat.
  2. ANTHROPIC — Claude claude-sonnet-4-6. Premium. Used when quality matters.
             Costs credits. Use sparingly or top up console.anthropic.com.
  3. HUGGINGFACE — Free fallback. Models come and go (many 410'd as of 2026-03).

All engines import: ask(), ask_json(), ask_json_list(), ai_available(), ai_backend()

This file IS the system's nervous system. When this works, everything works.
When this is dark, the organism sleeps.
"""
import os, json, re
import urllib.request, urllib.error

# ── Keys ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
GROQ_KEY      = os.environ.get("GROQ_API_KEY", "").strip()
ANTHROPIC_KEY = os.environ.get("ANTHROPIC_API_KEY", "").strip()
HF_TOKEN      = os.environ.get("HF_TOKEN", "").strip()
OPENROUTER_KEY = os.environ.get("OPENROUTER_KEY", "").strip()

# ── Model configs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
GROQ_MODELS = [
    "llama-3.3-70b-versatile",   # best free model — smart, fast
    "llama-3.1-8b-instant",      # fastest — good for simple tasks
    "mixtral-8x7b-32768",        # long context — good for code + analysis
    "gemma2-9b-it",              # Google Gemma — solid fallback
]

ANTHROPIC_MODEL = "claude-sonnet-4-6"

HF_MODELS = [
    "Qwen/Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct",
    "mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3",
    "HuggingFaceH4/zephyr-7b-beta",
]

OPENROUTER_MODELS = [
    "meta-llama/llama-3.1-8b-instruct:free",
    "mistralai/mistral-7b-instruct:free",
    "google/gemma-2-9b-it:free",
]


# ── Core API callers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def _call(url, headers, body, timeout=90):
    """Generic JSON POST via stdlib only (no requests dependency needed)."""
    data = json.dumps(body).encode()
    req  = urllib.request.Request(url, data=data, headers={**headers, "Content-Type": "application/json"})
    with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=timeout) as r:
        return json.loads(r.read())


def _ask_groq(messages, max_tokens=2000, system=None):
    """Groq — free, OpenAI-compatible, the backbone."""
    if not GROQ_KEY:
        raise RuntimeError("GROQ_API_KEY not set")

    full = []
    if system:
        full.append({"role": "system", "content": system})
    full.extend(messages)

    last_err = None
    for model in GROQ_MODELS:
        try:
            data = _call(
                "https://api.groq.com/openai/v1/chat/completions",
                {"Authorization": f"Bearer {GROQ_KEY}"},
                {"model": model, "messages": full, "max_tokens": max_tokens, "temperature": 0.7},
                timeout=60,
            )
            text = data["choices"][0]["message"]["content"]
            print(f"  [AI] Groq/{model.split('-')[0]}-{model.split('-')[1]} ✓ ({len(text)}c)")
            return text
        except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
            body = e.read().decode()[:200]
            print(f"  [AI] Groq/{model} — {e.code}: {body[:80]}")
            last_err = e
            if e.code in (401, 403):
                break  # bad key, don't try other models
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"  [AI] Groq/{model} — {e}")
            last_err = e

    raise RuntimeError(f"Groq failed. Last: {last_err}")


def _ask_anthropic(messages, max_tokens=2000, system=None):
    """Anthropic Claude — premium, use when quality matters."""
    if not ANTHROPIC_KEY:
        raise RuntimeError("ANTHROPIC_API_KEY not set")

    body = {"model": ANTHROPIC_MODEL, "max_tokens": max_tokens, "messages": messages}
    if system:
        body["system"] = system

    data = _call(
        "https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages",
        {"x-api-key": ANTHROPIC_KEY, "anthropic-version": "2023-06-01"},
        body,
        timeout=120,
    )
    text = data["content"][0]["text"]
    print(f"  [AI] Claude ✓ ({len(text)}c)")
    return text


def _ask_openrouter(messages, max_tokens=2000, system=None):
    """OpenRouter — free models, good variety."""
    if not OPENROUTER_KEY:
        raise RuntimeError("OPENROUTER_KEY not set")

    full = []
    if system:
        full.append({"role": "system", "content": system})
    full.extend(messages)

    last_err = None
    for model in OPENROUTER_MODELS:
        try:
            data = _call(
                "https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/chat/completions",
                {"Authorization": f"Bearer {OPENROUTER_KEY}",
                 "HTTP-Referer": "https://meekotharaccoon-cell.github.io/meeko-nerve-center",
                 "X-Title": "SolarPunk"},
                {"model": model, "messages": full, "max_tokens": max_tokens},
                timeout=60,
            )
            text = data["choices"][0]["message"]["content"]
            print(f"  [AI] OpenRouter/{model.split('/')[1][:20]} ✓ ({len(text)}c)")
            return text
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"  [AI] OpenRouter/{model} — {e}")
            last_err = e
    raise RuntimeError(f"OpenRouter failed. Last: {last_err}")


def _ask_hf(messages, max_tokens=2000, system=None):
    """HuggingFace — last resort, models frequently die."""
    if not HF_TOKEN:
        raise RuntimeError("HF_TOKEN not set")

    full = []
    if system:
        full.append({"role": "system", "content": system})
    full.extend(messages)

    last_err = None
    for model in HF_MODELS:
        try:
            url  = f"https://api-inference.huggingface.co/models/{model}/v1/chat/completions"
            data = _call(
                url,
                {"Authorization": f"Bearer {HF_TOKEN}"},
                {"model": model, "messages": full, "max_tokens": max_tokens, "temperature": 0.7},
                timeout=60,
            )
            text = data["choices"][0]["message"]["content"]
            print(f"  [AI] HF/{model.split('/')[-1][:20]} ✓ ({len(text)}c)")
            return text
        except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
            code = e.code
            body = e.read().decode()[:100]
            if code == 410:
                print(f"  [AI] HF/{model.split('/')[-1]} — 410 Gone, skip")
            else:
                print(f"  [AI] HF/{model.split('/')[-1]} — {code}: {body}")
            last_err = e
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"  [AI] HF/{model.split('/')[-1]} — {e}")
            last_err = e

    raise RuntimeError(f"All HF models failed. Last: {last_err}")


# ── Priority chain: FREE first, paid second, scraps last ─────────────────────

def ask(messages, max_tokens=2000, system=None, prefer_quality=False):
    """
    The loop's voice.

    prefer_quality=False (default): Groq → OpenRouter → Anthropic → HF
    prefer_quality=True:            Anthropic → Groq → OpenRouter → HF
    Use prefer_quality=True only for high-stakes calls (final copy, engine generation).
    """
    if prefer_quality:
        chain = [
            ("anthropic", _ask_anthropic),
            ("groq",      _ask_groq),
            ("openrouter", _ask_openrouter),
            ("hf",        _ask_hf),
        ]
    else:
        chain = [
            ("groq",      _ask_groq),
            ("openrouter", _ask_openrouter),
            ("anthropic", _ask_anthropic),
            ("hf",        _ask_hf),
        ]

    last_err = None
    for name, fn in chain:
        key_present = {
            "groq": bool(GROQ_KEY),
            "anthropic": bool(ANTHROPIC_KEY),
            "openrouter": bool(OPENROUTER_KEY),
            "hf": bool(HF_TOKEN),
        }[name]
        if not key_present:
            continue
        try:
            return fn(messages, max_tokens=max_tokens, system=system)
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"  [AI] {name} error: {e}")
            last_err = e

    raise RuntimeError(f"All AI backends failed. Last: {last_err}")


def ask_json(prompt, max_tokens=2000, system=None, prefer_quality=False):
    sys_suffix = "\nRespond ONLY with a valid JSON object. No markdown fences, no preamble, no explanation."
    full_sys   = ((system or "") + sys_suffix).strip()
    try:
        text = ask([{"role": "user", "content": prompt}],
                   max_tokens=max_tokens, system=full_sys, prefer_quality=prefer_quality)
        text = text.strip()
        # Strip markdown fences
        text = re.sub(r"^```(?:json)?\s*", "", text)
        text = re.sub(r"\s*```$", "", text)
        s, e = text.find("{"), text.rfind("}") + 1
        if s >= 0 and e > s:
            return json.loads(text[s:e])
    except Exception as ex:
        print(f"  [AI] ask_json parse failed: {ex}")
    return None


def ask_json_list(prompt, max_tokens=2000, system=None, prefer_quality=False):
    sys_suffix = "\nRespond ONLY with a valid JSON array. No markdown fences, no preamble, no explanation."
    full_sys   = ((system or "") + sys_suffix).strip()
    try:
        text = ask([{"role": "user", "content": prompt}],
                   max_tokens=max_tokens, system=full_sys, prefer_quality=prefer_quality)
        text = text.strip()
        text = re.sub(r"^```(?:json)?\s*", "", text)
        text = re.sub(r"\s*```$", "", text)
        s, e = text.find("["), text.rfind("]") + 1
        if s >= 0 and e > s:
            return json.loads(text[s:e])
    except Exception as ex:
        print(f"  [AI] ask_json_list parse failed: {ex}")
    return []


def ask_code(prompt, language="python", max_tokens=3000):
    """Generate code. Uses quality chain — Anthropic > Groq."""
    system = (
        f"You are an expert {language} programmer. "
        f"Output ONLY valid {language} code. No explanations, no markdown fences, "
        f"no comments except inline. The code must be complete and runnable."
    )
    return ask([{"role": "user", "content": prompt}],
               max_tokens=max_tokens, system=system, prefer_quality=True)


def ai_available():
    return bool(GROQ_KEY or ANTHROPIC_KEY or HF_TOKEN or OPENROUTER_KEY)


def ai_backend():
    """Return name of primary available backend."""
    if GROQ_KEY:      return "groq"
    if ANTHROPIC_KEY: return "anthropic"
    if OPENROUTER_KEY: return "openrouter"
    if HF_TOKEN:      return "huggingface"
    return "none"


def ai_status():
    """Full status for logging."""
    return {
        "groq":       bool(GROQ_KEY),
        "anthropic":  bool(ANTHROPIC_KEY),
        "openrouter": bool(OPENROUTER_KEY),
        "hf":         bool(HF_TOKEN),
        "primary":    ai_backend(),
        "available":  ai_available(),
    }


if __name__ == "__main__":
    status = ai_status()
    print(f"AI_CLIENT — primary: {status['primary']}")
    print(f"  Groq: {'✅' if status['groq'] else '❌'}  "
          f"Anthropic: {'✅' if status['anthropic'] else '❌'}  "
          f"OpenRouter: {'✅' if status['openrouter'] else '❌'}  "
          f"HF: {'✅' if status['hf'] else '❌'}")
    if ai_available():
        r = ask([{"role": "user", "content": "Say exactly: SolarPunk AI online. The loop runs."}], max_tokens=30)
        print(f"  Test: {r}")
    else:
        print("  ❌ No AI backend available")
